chains.name: AI Infrastructure Cascade
chains.mechanism: Compute demand propagates into memory, packaging, power and cooling.

events.description: Repeated ask-side premium fixture; intent unconfirmed

doctrine: Start from an important decision problem, not an available dataset.
Detect what has already changed before forecasting what may change.
Study historical winners and losers; explain mechanisms, not resemblance.
Record contradictory evidence and uncertainty explicitly.
Explain the rational counterparty and the source of advantage.
Run the cheapest valid falsifier against a strong market-specific baseline.
Ablate complexity and inspect failure piles, not only aggregate metrics.
No prospective evidence means no capital permission.

us.label: US STOCKS
us.decision_problem: Find company-specific value capture and estimate revisions before the market fully reprices them.

current_rain.claim: Loaded price breadth is constructive now; this is present-state context, not proof of future excess return.
current_rain.evidence: 120 loaded names · 62.0% advancing · 58.0% above 50D · median 20D +4.2% · top context NVDA / BUILD LONG

structural_pressure.claim: 1 structural candidates are mapped; mechanism and value capture remain case-specific.

market_recognition.claim: NVDA is the leading structural research candidate (3–10x headroom class; timing BUILD_LONG). Headroom is not a target or probability; value capture, valuation and remaining return still require proof.

study_the_tape.winner_autopsy: No winner case may be inferred from price similarity alone. Link a point-in-time winner and loser case before promotion.
why_others_failed: options print was hedge or roll

condition_persistence.evidence: At least one cross-source event is linked.

edge_decomposition.note: No composite edge score is produced. Each dimension must earn evidence independently.

counterparty_challenge.why_favorable: UNASSESSED — explain information, interpretation, horizon, constraint or liquidity-provision advantage.
counterparty_challenge.hard_gate: No counterparty explanation means no edge claim.

cost_of_staying.current_choice: PROBE/WAIT decision must be instrument-specific; no numeric score is invented.

execution.thesis_invalidation: Broken mechanism/value capture or a critical condition that no longer holds.

validation.baseline: Price trend + market beta + earnings revisions + liquidity.
validation.next_cheapest_falsifier: Test whether the selected evidence adds point-in-time OOS lift over: Price trend + market beta + earnings revisions + liquidity.
validation.reason: Executable price context exists, but it remains a research watch until validated and prospectively promoted.
